title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: Fabio Giglietto presented a paper at the 2026 International Communication Association conference in Cape Town, focusing on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook, and how Facebook's algorithmic changes affect engagement with news URLs.
description: This mention details Fabio Giglietto's presentation at the 2026 International Communication Association conference, focusing on Facebook's algorithmic effects on news engagement, partisan alignment, and journalistic quality.
